headline: McKesson Selects Moore, Oklahoma for a State-of-the-Art Regional Distribution Center Positions Cleveland County as a National Healthcare Supply Chain Hub
summary: Today, the Oklahoma Department of Commerce and the Cleveland County Economic Development Coalition announced that announced that McKesson Corporation, a Fortune 100, U.S. based company that serves as a logistical and operational backbone of the healthcare system to help ensure patients can access medicines, has selected Moore, Oklahoma as the location for a highly automated regional distribution facility at the North Moore Industrial Park. headline: McKesson ideaShare 2026 Fuels Momentum for Independent Pharmacies
summary: IRVING, Texas, June 23, 2026--Last week, McKesson Corporation hosted McKesson ideaShare 2026, the company’s annual event for independent community pharmacies, in Denver, Colorado.
